SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-16-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF MAXSIM ARTEMENKO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALVIN NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARISA NGUYEN IS NOT PRESENT. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE MEDIATION PROGRAM AND SUCCESSFULLY RESOLVED THEIR DISPUTE WITH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE APRIL HEARING, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
